mapper.select: SELECT CATEGORY_NO as "categoryNo", CATEGORY_NAME as "categoryName", CATEGORY_IMG as "categoryImg" FROM BAG_ITEM_CATEGORY ORDER BY CATEGORY_NO ASC
SELECT ITEM_NO as itemNo, CATEGORY_NO as categoryNo, ITEM_NAME as itemName, ITEM_INFO as itemInfo, ITEM_IMG as itemImg, ITEM_TYPE as itemType FROM BAG_ITEM_INFO ORDER BY ITEM_NAME ASC

SELECT ITEM_NO as itemNo, CATEGORY_NO as categoryNo, ITEM_NAME as itemName, ITEM_INFO as itemInfo, ITEM_IMG as itemImg, ITEM_TYPE as itemType FROM BAG_ITEM_INFO WHERE CATEGORY_NO = #{categoryNo} ORDER BY ITEM_NAME ASC
